user.title: Connect to Gemini AI
user.description: Enter your Google Gemini API key. The integration will use Gemini to extract the weekly schedule from the BJC newsletter PDF. Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Gemini API key. Please check your key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Gemini API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Update Gemini settings
init.description: Update your Gemini API key or model.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Gemini API.
